# Task Contract

**Format name:** Task file (`docs/tasks/<filename>`)
**Filename:** generated by `scripts/task-filename.sh <slug>` → `YYYYMMDD-HHMM-{slug}.json`
**Schema:** `contracts/task-schema.json` (schema_version: `"1"`)

## Producers

- `skills/to-tasks/` — primary producer, converts PRDs into task files
- `skills/to-e2e-tasks/` — produces task files focused on e2e test coverage
- `skills/debug/` — produces task files when fixes require multiple steps (non-inline only)
- `skills/improve-component/` — produces task files for component refactor work
- `skills/code-review/` — produces task files after HITL finding-vetting checklist

## Consumers

- `skills/run-tasks/` — executes tasks sequentially, updates status and follow_ups
- `skills/run-task-followups/` — walks through follow_ups interactively
- `skills/tasks-to-linear/` — syncs tasks to Linear, writes back `linear_url`

## Optional fields

- `browser_verify`: present only for UI tasks requiring post-TDD browser verification
- `linear_url`: written back by tasks-to-linear after syncing; null until then

## Schema file

[task-schema.json](task-schema.json)
